heading: Omitted
label: 6681 to 6685 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 6681 to 6685 were omitted pursuant to section 6685 which provided that sections 6681 to 6685 ceased to be effective , and that the National Critical Technologies Panel established by this subchapter terminated on that date.Dec. 31, 2000Section 6681, , as added , , , established a National Critical Technologies Panel.Pub.
